action_instruction: Typing a new display name in the Sign up form
intent: PRIMARY: display name input; role=textbox; text="Display name"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing a new display name in the Sign up form'):
        element_0 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Display name\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(element_0)
        await element_0.click()
        await element_0.fill("TGUser05310008")
rationale: Step 1 requires entering new display name, email, and password before submitting; start by filling the display name field.

generated_code:

    async with testmu.step('Typing a new password into the Password field'):
        element_2 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Password\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(element_2)

action_instruction: Clicking the Sign up button to submit the form
intent: PRIMARY: Sign up submit button; role=button; text="Sign up" | HINTS: large green button below Password field
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=button[name=\"Sign up\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()
    except Exception:
        await page.mouse.click(960, 733)
        set_visual_context(960, 733)
rationale: All sign-up fields (display name, email, password) are filled; submitting the form is the next required step to create the account.

We have already entered display name, email, and password (task step 1) as shown in action history; this no-op wait allows us to close out the transaction step tracking cleanly before final verification.
